specific_mechanism: Schubert-cycle cross-attention module with new cycle parameters and new learnable cycle bridge (new module)
llm_application: Schubert-cycle cross-attention module: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new cycle parameters) implementing Schubert-cycle cross-attention module; module adds new learnable cycle bridge and new inter-cohomology pathway, creating new architectural-topology change distinct from baseline; module's parameters are not derivable from existing weights
